title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Williams F1 Team partnered with Atlassian and Anthropic to visualize driver and team decision-making patterns using Claude. The "Pattern of Thought" project converts physiological and cognitive data into visual designs displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays at Monaco and other races.
